title: INIT-2.3.X — Bypass Enforcement Runtime (E-2 + G-6 closure)

sha_binding.note: SHA bound to squash-merge commit on main after PR #888 merged 2026-05-27

deliverables.description: E-2 closure: emit unknown-evaluator-skipped diagnostic event. G-6 closure: validateGovernanceException() method with use-time expiration enforcement. Injectable constructor for test isolation.

Adversarial tests: 4 E-2 tests (unknown evaluator diagnostic event + no false violations + per-invariant count + known evaluator negative), 6 G-6 tests (active/expired/rolled-back/explicit-expired/no-expired-event/deterministic-now).
E-2 and G-6 reclassified Enforced. Section 3.1 updated. Section 5 deferred list trimmed.

cert_blocker_closure.CERT-BLK-002: CLOSED — G-6: engine.validateGovernanceException() enforces expiration at use time
cert_blocker_closure.CERT-BLK-003: CLOSED — G-6: same method; expired/rolled-back exceptions throw GovernanceExceptionValidationError
cert_blocker_closure.CERT-BLK-005: CLOSED — E-2: unknown evaluator emits UnknownEvaluatorDiagnostic (replaySafe: true)
